DLY-TEN.name: Tenant Dependency
DLY-TEN.description: Property occupied by tenant; outcome gated on tenant vacating or giving notice
DLY-TEN.conversion_strategy: Sign the agreement NOW with a deferred start date. Don’t wait for vacancy to sign — that’s how deadlines are missed.
DLY-TEN.risk: If tenant renews, lead goes cold permanently
DLY-TEN.offer_timing_note: Special offer deadline must be set BEFORE expected vacancy date — creates signing urgency

DLY-FUR.name: Unfurnished Property
DLY-FUR.description: Property needs furnishing before STL onboarding can begin
DLY-FUR.conversion_strategy: Sign agreement first, then furnish. Stayful can advise on furnishing spec. Don’t let furnishing block the contract signature.

DLY-PUR.name: Purchase Not Yet Complete
DLY-PUR.description: Property being purchased; keys not yet received
DLY-PUR.conversion_strategy: Sign the agreement now. Include expected completion date. Onboarding prep begins in parallel (photography scheduled, listing built).
DLY-PUR.risk: Developer-affiliated management will try to sign at exchange. Stayful must move first.
DLY-PUR.developer_competition_note: Developer affiliates win by: (1) proximity at exchange, (2) inflating net projections by omitting cleaning costs. Counter both.

DLY-MOV.name: Moving Abroad / Relocation
DLY-MOV.description: Owner relocating internationally; needs UK property managed remotely
DLY-MOV.conversion_strategy: Relocation date IS the offer deadline. Frame full management as the solution to the problem they’re already anxious about.
DLY-MOV.key_reassurance: Show: one contact, monthly statements, payout 1st-5th, maintenance handled. No active owner involvement needed.

DLY-OTH.name: Other Delays
DLY-OTH.description: Spouse/partner gate, renovation, legal review, competitor evaluation, timeline preference

spouse_partner_gate.strategy: Get both decision-makers in the same call. If not possible, send a summary document they can share. Never close on one party with a promise to 'speak to spouse later' — that’s a soft no.

renovation.strategy: Sign agreement now; start date post-renovation. Stayful can advise on STL-optimal finishes during renovation.

competitor_evaluation.strategy: Don’t wait. Offer expires. Make it explicit: ‘This rate is available until [date]. After that it’s 15%.’ Most analytical evaluators appreciate directness.

product_mismatch_guaranteed_rent.strategy: Pre-qualify out. Stayful does not offer guaranteed rent on 1-bed properties. Probing question on first call: ‘Are you looking for fixed or variable income?’
